emails.subject: A thought
emails.body: A thought Hi Ben, How's about the Acccounting/Finance presentation at noon on May 23rd, then we can all go to the Astros' game at 305? Kay

emails.subject: Re: A thought
emails.body: Re: A thought I can't do it that week. I'm on travel black out because my wife is going away for the week and I have the home duty (first time she's ever done this in 6 years so I probably need to let her go as if I had any say!). How about something the following week? Ben Kay Mann@ENRON 05/11/2001 10:40 AM

emails.body: I think you'd better stick close to home and smile when she gets back. ckm Ben F Jacoby@ECT 05/11/2001 11:42 AM Sent by: Ben Jacoby@ECT
